title: Create your first project
notes:
Projects help you organize your tasks by topic. Each project has its own task list and backlog.

**How to create a project:**
1. Click the **+** button next to **Projects** in the sidebar
2. Give it a name and pick a color
3. Start adding tasks to it

title: Set up Sync
notes:
Keep your data safe and accessible across devices.

**How to set up:**
1. Open **Settings** (gear icon in the sidebar)
2. Go to **Sync**
3. Choose a provider: SuperSync, Nextcloud, Dropbox, or local file sync
4. Follow the setup instructions

title: Learn the keyboard shortcuts
notes:
Super Productivity is designed to be used with the keyboard. Learn the shortcuts to work faster.

**How to start:**
1. Open the **sidebar menu**
2. Go to **Help**
3. Click **How to: Keyboard Navigation**

title: Go further
notes:
There is much more to discover!

**App Features** (in Settings) — Enable integrations, habits, and other features. Go to **Settings → App Features** to see what's available.

**Boards** — Visualize your tasks in customizable Kanban-style boards. Enable them in **App Features**, then find them in the **sidebar menu**.

**Schedule** — Plan your day by scheduling tasks at specific times. Drag tasks onto the **Schedule** view in the sidebar to organize your timeline.

**Integrations** — Once enabled in App Features, import tasks from Jira, GitHub, GitLab, Gitea, OpenProject, CalDAV, and many more. You can also integrate your calendar. Configure them in the **Issue Provider Panel**.

**Habits** — Track recurring habits and routines. Find them in the **sidebar menu** once enabled.

**Plugins** — Add features like the Procrastination Buster, Automations, or Voice Reminders. Go to **Settings → Plugins**.

**Customize** — Themes, dark mode, keyboard shortcuts, language, and productivity helpers are all in **Settings**.
